prompt: Replace the plain black cap with a faceted crystal stopper and emboss the label text in rose-gold foil.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Replace the existing plain black cap on the perfume bottle with a faceted crystal stopper. Furthermore, emboss all label text (including 'N°5', 'CHANEL', 'PARIS', 'EAU DE TOILETTE', 'VAPORISATEUR SPRAY', '100 ml', and '3.4 FL.OZ') visible on both the perfume bottle and its accompanying box with a rose-gold foil texture and finish.
objects: plain black cap (should not be present)
yellow perfume liquid inside the bottle
embossed rose-gold foil 'N°5' text on perfume bottle
embossed rose-gold foil 'CHANEL' text on perfume bottle
embossed rose-gold foil 'PARIS' text on perfume bottle
embossed rose-gold foil 'N°5', 'CHANEL', 'PARIS' text on perfume box
embossed rose-gold foil 'EAU DE TOILETTE', 'VAPORISATEUR SPRAY', '100 ml', '3.4 FL.OZ' text on perfume box
